title: Scythe-Able Mace
description: This is a texture pack that makes the mace look like a scythe.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/313fb4e7c660b52c7e725964e8713a92c01eb8cf.png)
# Information
_~[Please read everything here carefuly and don't rush take your time]~_

## _Question #1: "What is the purpose of this texture pack?"_
- **The purpose of the texture pack is to change the mace's texture from a cube like to a scythe just like [ManePear's Video](https://youtu.be/5QDzN36Wkp8?si=mS7oxzcRLDiAJy7k](https://youtu.be/5QDzN36Wkp8?si=mS7oxzcRLDiAJy7k)).**

## _Question #2: "Why would I download this?"_
- **Its your choice to download this or no, am not forcing you to download it, this is made for players to have fun with or just enjoy the texture itself and its even tagged as a texture pack and it is one.**

## _Question #3: "Is it a virus?"_
- **No it is not a virus, even if it was how and why would it be on modrinth? the staff would take it down immediately off the platform and suspend my account and this would no longer exist.**

## _Question #4: "Are there any other features to this?"_
- **Nope sadly I haven't added more to this and am not getting any ideas of what to add other than scythe sounds which are useless since its a mace and you can use it in air and ground fights cause of Dentisty and Breach either way there aren't any new features.**

## _Question #5:"What made you do this texture pack?"_
- **My friend wanted the same mace texture as Mane Pear's mace in his video but he didn't know how to do pixel art so I made it for him and handed it to him and made this public.**

Suggestions are accepted in my discord for more texture packs or little features to be added.
And if you don't mind doing a little _**[Donation](https://ko-fi.com/freakybvd)**_ ?

Thank you for your time. ![SmallHeart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/434af4c43c449dd030f8a8808d2741ddc9824566.png)
![TitleOfFreaky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70f5aef146936aa09a218b7295c77d348dd6a1ef_0.webp)
